									<p>This is a fast-growing opportunity which aims at helping you securely grow your Bitcoins instead of leaving it in your wallet where it will do nothing.</p><p>When you have completed your registration with Tesla Investment & Stocks , you can join with a minimum of US$100 worth of Bitcoin, which will go into a trading pool. Then you can sit back, relax and watch your Bitcoin grow daily.</p><p>CIL offers an optional referral program where the company rewards members for marketing the opportunity. Should you wish choose to refer anyone to MTI, you will receive a 10% referral commission.</p><p>Now if you would like to build a team, you can earn additional bonuses from the company. Based on the traditional binary system, you will need to refer at least two people, one on the left and one on the right. To qualify for the weekly binary bonus which will need to have a minimum of US$200 worth of Bitcoin in your own trading pool, and have the two referrals. As soon as these criteria are in place, you will start earning the binary bonuses.</p><p>Binary bonuses are paid on the volume invested in your weakest leg. It doesn’t rely on the number of people, but rather how much Bitcoin each member has in the trading pool. For example, the left leg may have two people who have US$1000 worth of Bitcoin each, but the right leg has 7 people who have US$100 worth of Bitcoin each, therefore the right leg in this case is the weakest leg and you will be paid your Binary bonus accordingly.</p><p>Now imagine as your team grows, and the amount of Bitcoin in each leg increases…so too will your weekly Binary Bonus increase.</p><p>Please remember that Tesla Investment & Stocks Investment Limited is a registered company, and, like any business, if there are no profits there can be no bonuses for that week. The trading profits are divided among the members, company, expert traders, the binary and leadership bonuses.</p><p>This is a real opportunity and it is already starting to change lives.
